ai_summary: Ansal Properties and Infrastructure Limited (APIL) has scheduled its 54th Committee of Creditors meeting for the 'Fernhill project' on July 10, 2026, indicating the project remains deep within a protracted Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) initiated in 2023. This meeting, coupled with references to other APIL projects also under separate or confined insolvency proceedings (Lucknow, Rajasthan, and previously approved for Serene Residency), highlights severe and fragmented financial distress across the company's portfolio. The high number of CoC meetings for Fernhill acts as a significant red flag, signaling a lengthy and complex resolution process with potential for further erosion of asset value.
